zh.lifeSummary: William Hughes SR是E Hubert Husse和Elena Helena le Bon Normandy的兒子，於大約1045年出生在法國諾門迪。他於1078年與Mary FitzRoberts結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1086年之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Hughes SR是E Hubert Husse和Elena Helena le Bon Normandy的儿子，于大约1045年出生在法国諾門迪。他于1078年与Mary FitzRoberts结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1086年之后在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William Hughes SR was born about 1045, in Normandy, France as the son of E Hubert Husse and Elena Helena le Bon Normandy. He married Mary FitzRoberts in 1078. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died after 1086, in Bath, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: William Hughes SR est né environ 1045, à Normandie, France, fils d’E Hubert Husse et Elena Helena le Bon Normandy. Il a épousé Mary FitzRoberts en 1078. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé après 1086, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: William Hughes SR wurde um 1045 in Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von E Hubert Husse und Elena Helena le Bon Normandy geboren. Er hat 1078 Mary FitzRoberts geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb nach 1086 in Bath, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: William Hughes SR è nato il circa 1045 nel Normandie, Francia come figlio di E Hubert Husse e Elena Helena le Bon Normandy. Lui sposato Mary FitzRoberts nel 1078. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì dopo il 1086, nel Bath, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hughes SRは約1045年にフランスノーマンディでE Hubert HusseとElena Helena le Bon Normandyの息子として生まれた。1078年にMary FitzRobertsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1086年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hughes SR(은)는 대략 1045년 프랑스 노먼디에서 E Hubert Husse(와)과 Elena Helena le Bon Normandy의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1078년 Mary FitzRoberts(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1086년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Hughes SR nasceu aproximadamente 1045, em Normandie, França filho de E Hubert Husse e Elena Helena le Bon Normandy. Ele casou-se com Mary FitzRoberts em 1078. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1086, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: William Hughes SR родился около 1045 г. в местности норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали E Hubert Husse и Elena Helena le Bon Normandy. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary FitzRoberts в 1078 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер после 1086 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
